name: MediNexus SaaS
description: MediNexus is a secure, multi-tenant SaaS platform designed for modern clinics. It integrates HIPAA-compliant patient record management with field-level encryption, role-based access control, and real-time appointment scheduling. The system features an AI-powered clinical assistant for SOAP note summarization, comprehensive billing and invoicing modules, and telehealth capabilities. Built for scalability with a React frontend and Node.js backend, MediNexus streamlines healthcare operations while ensuring data privacy and operational efficiency.
